abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course} with your lumbering mammoth, their thunderous stride marks a slow-paced yet resolute path; you may [decide before rolling] add +2 but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1).
You mammoth is a beast of burden. When you make a move which requires you to roll +supply, you may instead roll +your mammoth’s health.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} by riding your overpowering mammoth against a pack of foes, add +2. On a strong hit with a match, the ground trembles beneath your assault; mark progress.
